narrative:
Precinct Madison Township (precinct in Vinton County) has 211 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.2 percentage points.
